name: GitHub Repository Meta

tasks.title: Audit

scope: Two GitHub housekeeping items: (1) Create .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ with bug report and feature request templates. (2) Add a CODEOWNERS file mapping packages to @dorkusprime for automatic review assignment on PRs.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 child: codeowners (leaf). Issue templates already exist at .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ with bug_report.md and feature_request.md, so no work needed there. Only remaining scope item is the CODEOWNERS file.
